briefdescription.para: Set new target with linear ramp.

parameterdescription.para: Max change per update call (always positive).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Ramp *ramp, int32_t target, int32_t max_rate, int32_t accel)
memberdef.name: syn_ramp_set_target_trapezoid

briefdescription.para: Set new target with trapezoidal ramp (acceleration/deceleration).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Ramp *ramp, int32_t target, int32_t max_rate, int32_t accel, uint8_t frac_bits)
memberdef.name: syn_ramp_set_target_trapezoid_fp

briefdescription.para: Set new target with fixed-point trapezoidal ramp.

detaileddescription.para: Like syn_ramp_set_target_trapezoid(), but velocity and acceleration are in Qfrac_bits fixed-point. This allows sub-unit-per-tick resolution for smooth motion at high update rates.

parameterdescription.para: Number of fractional bits (e.g., 8 for Q8).

detaileddescription.para: Supports fixed-point velocity/accel when frac_bits > 0. Velocity and accel are in Qfrac_bits format. Position is integer; a fractional accumulator carries sub-unit remainder.

briefdescription.para: Update the ramp — call once per tick.
Jump immediately to a value (no ramp).
